calendar.matters:
Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee For The Sole Purpose Of Transferring Real Property Owned By Rosemary M.Maisel Qualified Personal Residence Trust
Off Calendar Apr-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for the petitioner.

Mr. Siracusa confirmed that there have been no objections to the petition. The Court granted the petition to appoint successor trustee for the sole purpose of transferring real property, etc., (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
